conversation.text: I want to build a Telegram chatbot for my family. It should be an AI assistant that can answer questions.
What model should the AI Agent use, and should the bot remember prior messages in the conversation?

OpenAI chat model. Yes, it should remember the last few messages — but the memory needs to be separate per Telegram chat, so that if my sister and my mum both talk to it, they each get their own thread.
Plan: Telegram Trigger → AI Agent (OpenAI chat model + memory) → Telegram send back to the same chat. Memory will be scoped by the trigger's chat id. Good?

executionScenarios.name: distinct-telegram-chat
executionScenarios.description: A Telegram message from one chat is answered with memory scoped to that chat id
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The Telegram Trigger receives a text message from chat id 123456 with text 'What is on the family calendar today?' from user 'Alex'. The AI Agent returns a short helpful answer. The Telegram sendMessage call returns a success response.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors. It contains a Telegram Trigger, an AI Agent, a chat model, and a memory node connected to the agent. The memory node scopes conversation history by Telegram chat id using an explicit source-node reference to the Telegram Trigger chat id, not $json. The final Telegram response is sent back to chat id 123456 and contains the AI Agent answer.
